repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Covenant and annual meeting minutes interspersed with membership records. Subjects discussed include revivals, the appointment of pastors, and church discipline.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The early history of this congregation as related by William G. Gardner (see the accessions folder) is unclear. Apparently a number of congregations from the area around Hornby Forks including Dryun, Jersey, Catlin, Mead's Creek, Campbell (then West Hill) and Erwin had formed congregations which contributed members to the Hornby Church at its formation between 1825 and 1838. In 1840 the Mead's Creek Baptist Church was set off from Hornby as a separate congregation. The church originally belonged to the Steuben Association but by 1847 had joined the Chemung River Baptist Association which met in Hornby in 1860. After 1862 the Hornby church had a Sunday school.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of the Hornby Baptist Church (1860-1916) contain monthly covenant and annual meeting minutes interspersed with membership lists which are revised periodically between i860 and 1895. Minutes deal mainly with the condition of the church, the election of trustees, church discipline, and procuring ministers. In the back of the volume are minutes of the Chemung River Baptist Association in 1865 and the Program of the 67th Annual meeting held in 1909. Some entries are illegible.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Baptist Church of Hornby records, #6074. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Steuben County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Revivals -- New York (State) -- Hornby.
Baptists -- New York (State) -- Hornby.
Church discipline.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Hornby.
Baptists -- Education.
controlaccess.corpname: Baptist Church of Mead\'s Creek (Mead\'s Creek, N.Y.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains monthly covenant meeting and annual meeting minutes with membership information interspersed. They record the appointment of pastors, the receiving and dismissal of members, congregational discipline, and occasionally, church policy. Membership lists and items of note in the meeting minutes are as follows:

scopecontent.p: List of months and money.

scopecontent.p: Visit by the American Home Mission Society agent.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church hosted the Meeting of the Chemung River Baptist Association.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Sunday School is organized

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: contents Ordination of Bro. F. G. Surbridge.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discussion of how to achieve a revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discussion of whether or not to have a revival.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted that the meeting house not be used for political meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Covenant and Articles of Faith of the Baptist Publishing Society at Philadelphia are adopted by the congregation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Female members are given the right to participate in and vote on all transactions of the church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: After a slump new members begin to come in.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pages are out of order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Statistics for 1905.

scopecontent.p: Program of the 67th Annual Meeting of the Chemung River Baptist Association, 1909.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes of the 23rd Anniversary of the Chemung River Baptist Association, 1865.

scopecontent.p: Blank.

scopecontent.p: Last minutes
